text: hey are you joining northstar standup or going async? your cal shows blocked til 10:30
blocked — lands end run went long, sorry. i'll be there by 10:20, can you kick it off? just do blockers first
on it. also devs are asking about the reporting dashboard spec before sprint planning friday — can we get 30 min?
yes, tomorrow 2pm. spec needs another pass anyway after yesterday's customer call, i have notes. i'll send the invite
lgtm, see you then 👍
pushed the updated dashboard spec to confluence — added the cohort filter section ryan flagged. take a look before friday
freeze is oct 9, that gives us 4 sprints. tight but doable if we cut the export-to-pdf nice-to-have. thoughts?
agree, pdf export goes to fast-follow. pilots haven't asked for it once. keeping us focused on the core dashboard
pilot #2 session notes: they love the funnel view but want saved segments. third time it's come up — bumping it up the backlog
saved segments is a half-day on the data side if we reuse the cohort query. i can take it next sprint
perfect. i'll let the pilot know it's coming. don't promise a date yet though
week 6 activation experiment is up 8.2% on the new onboarding checklist. stat sig now. recommend we ship to 100%
numbers check out on my end too. retention curve holds at day 14. shipping
anyone else going to the new veggie taco spot on valencia at noon? i need to not eat at my desk today
in. as long as it's not another sad desk salad week
design review for the segment picker is ready — figma link in the thread. mostly want eyes on the empty state
empty state is great. one note: let's surface the 'create your first segment' cta higher so it's not below the fold on laptops
welcome maria to the growth pod! she's joining us from the marketing side to own activation metrics 🎉
q1 all-hands is feb 27 at 10am pacific. zoom link and agenda will go out monday. northstar pilot update on the agenda
northstar sprint board is updated for the week — i moved the saved-segments ticket to in-progress and dropped pdf export to fast-follow. shout if anything looks off
pilot p99 is back under 800ms after the pre-agg cache. closing NS-201, will call it out in standup
nice. that unblocks the beta widen. i'll flip the flag for pilot #2 tomorrow am
activation funnel readout is up in amplitude. step 3 drop is still the killer, 41% fall off before first dashboard save
confirmed on my end, the drop lines up with the empty-state. we should ship the sample dataset onboarding
feature freeze is oct 9, hard date. anything not merged by then rolls to fast-follow
agreed. let's keep the freeze clean, no heroics the week before
@tomoko the retention card hierarchy is much better. can we make weekly activated accounts the hero metric?
yep, pushing a revision with WAA as the hero and raw counts demoted to the tooltip
hartwell wants scheduled csv digests before they expand seats. adding to the beta scope doc
reminder: pilot feedback session thursday 2pm, agenda in the notion doc. bring the top-3 asks per account
search index tuning PR is merged, p99 on /search down to 380ms. thanks for pushing on this steph
can we get the north-star metric locked before the QBR? i don't want to relitigate WAA vs raw actives again
locking WAA. i'll back you in the QBR if it comes up
ship checklist is at 80%. open items: export edge cases, empty-state copy, and the alerting runbook
pricing experiment v2 results: the annual-nudge lifted conversion 6.2% but hurt trial-to-paid. holding for now
same read. i'd not ship the nudge until we understand the trial cannibalization
tomoko's empty-state ships this sprint. that should move activation step 3, will watch amplitude after
event taxonomy cleanup: we have three names for the same save action. consolidating to dashboard_saved
meadowlark churned a seat but gave great feedback on the filter UX. writing it up in confluence
false alarm on the pilot latency alert, was a warehouse backfill. no user impact
can eng give me a realistic estimate on the report exporter? PM wants it in beta, i want it right
onboarding funnel test is live to 50%. checking significance friday, don't peek early
northstar pilot #1 renewed and added 20 seats. the dashboard perf work paid off
huge. nice work steph and team
q3 roadmap draft is in notion. headline is enterprise reporting + saved views. feedback by friday
reading 'shipping great products' by kenji ota, the chapter on scope cuts is basically our GA plan
moving the standup to async on wednesdays during freeze week so eng gets heads-down time
appreciated. async wednesdays it is
can someone loop me in before the hartwell renewal call? i want to preview the reporting roadmap for them
pilot #3 is quiet. going to ping their PM to make sure the beta invite didn't get lost
crit thursday: cohort explorer + saved views. tomoko driving, i'll take notes
pilot p99 is back under 800ms after the pre-agg cache. closing NS-201, will call it out in standup (wk2 follow-up: can you drop the link here?)
